query:
SELECT 
  ar.*,
  a.titulo as acao_titulo,
  u.name as solicitante_nome
FROM adjustment_requests ar
LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON ar.userId = u.id;
